atomic_units.action: Assign the mandatory e‑learning modules (Information Security Awareness, Prevention of Sexual Harassment, Anti‑Bribery and Corruption Policy, and Data Privacy Fundamentals) to the employee in the Learning Management System on Day 1
Monitor the employee's training completion status weekly via the LMS dashboard
Send a reminder to the employee and copy the Hiring Manager
atomic_units.condition: If the employee has not completed the mandatory modules by Day 10

atomic_units.action: Escalate the incomplete training to the HR Manager
atomic_units.condition: If the mandatory modules remain incomplete by Day 15

atomic_units.action: Notify the employee formally that non‑completion may affect their probation assessment
